# Slidez

> Slidez is an AI stylist and virtual try-on app. Users describe a vibe or occasion, and the AI generates a complete outfit — top, bottom, shoes, and accessories. Users can also virtually try on any clothing item before buying, using their own photo.

Slidez is free on iOS and Android. A Chrome extension is also available for trying on clothes directly from any shopping site.

## What Slidez does

- Generates outfit ideas for any occasion (date night, work, concerts, casual, winter layers)
- Virtually tries clothing, shoes, sunglasses, jewelry, and accessories on your photo
- Imports items from Instagram or any website for virtual try-on
- Provides AI-powered styling recommendations based on your preferences
